creator: iwama@t3.rim.or.jp
text:
I also tried Ultra30. I could not boot with unmodified 11.2-RELEASE disc1 with the same error as V245. However, I could boot the disc1 to which the patch was applied. 

However, if I install both zfsboot and zfsloader on HDD and boot it, I fail like V245. The boot log is as follows:

===
ok boot /pci@1f,2000/scsi@1,1/disk@0,0
Boot device: /pci@1f,2000/scsi@1,1/disk@0,0  File and args: 
 
>> FreeBSD/sparc64 ZFS boot block
   Boot path:   /pci@1f,2000/scsi@1,1/disk@0,0:a
Consoles: Open Firmware console  
|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\
FreeBSD/sparc64 ZFS enabled bootstrap loader, Revision 1.0
(Thu Aug 23 19:15:53 JST 2018 root@v245.led.t3.rim.or.jp)
bootpath="/pci@1f,2000/scsi@1,1/disk@0,0:a"
|/-\|/-\
|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\|/-\can't load 'kernel'

Type '?' for a list of commands, 'help' for more detailed help.
OK 
===
